label: Layout scatter parms
description: Parameters for scattering things randomly inside a room. The element name is the ThingDef defName (the 'def' field).

def.label: Thing
def.description: ThingDef to scatter. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

stuff.label: Stuff
stuff.description: Material (ThingDef) used when the scattered thing is stuffable.

groupCount.label: Group count
groupCount.description: Fixed number of groups to place. Uses IntRange.Invalid to derive count from groupsPerHundredCells instead.

groupsPerHundredCells.label: Groups per hundred cells
groupsPerHundredCells.description: Random range for how many scatter groups appear per 100 room cells. Used when groupCount is invalid.

itemsPerGroup.label: Items per group
itemsPerGroup.description: Random range for how many items appear in each scatter group.

groupDistRange.label: Group dist range
groupDistRange.description: Random range for the spread radius of items within a scatter group.

minGroups.label: Min groups
minGroups.description: Minimum number of groups that must be placed regardless of cell count.
